## 📋 Feature Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the feature -->

## 🎯 Business Value
<!-- Quantify the expected business impact for intelligent priority scoring -->
- **User Impact:** <!-- Number of users affected or user experience improvement -->
- **Performance Improvement:** <!-- Expected performance gains (e.g., response time) -->
- **Revenue Impact:** <!-- Expected revenue increase or cost savings -->
- **Strategic Alignment:** <!-- How does this align with business objectives -->

## 🏗️ Technical Requirements
<!-- The system will auto-analyze these for complexity estimation -->
- **Clean Architecture Layers Affected:** <!-- Domain/Application/Infrastructure/Presentation -->
- **Performance Requirements:** <!-- Must meet <0.12s response time target -->
- **Integration Points:** <!-- Which services/APIs will be affected -->
- **Technology Stack:** <!-- Programming languages, frameworks, databases -->

## 🧠 ML/AI Components
<!-- Check if applicable - triggers automatic ML team routing -->
- [ ] Machine Learning Algorithm Required
- [ ] Data Science Analysis Needed
- [ ] Prediction Service Integration
- [ ] Analytics Dashboard Updates
- [ ] Model Training/Retraining Required

## 🔧 Technical Implementation
<!-- Provide technical details for architecture impact assessment -->
- **Database Changes:** <!-- Schema modifications, new tables -->
- **API Changes:** <!-- New endpoints, modifications to existing -->
- **Service Dependencies:** <!-- External services, internal microservices -->
- **Event Bus Integration:** <!-- Redis Pub/Sub, event sourcing -->

## ⚡ Performance Considerations
<!-- Critical for SLA compliance assessment -->
- **Expected Load:** <!-- Requests per minute/hour -->
- **Response Time Target:** <!-- Must be <0.12s for compliance -->
- **Memory Requirements:** <!-- Expected memory usage -->
- **Scalability Needs:** <!-- Horizontal/vertical scaling requirements -->

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Clear, testable criteria for completion -->
1. [ ] Functional requirement 1
2. [ ] Functional requirement 2
3. [ ] Performance requirement (<0.12s response time)
4. [ ] Clean Architecture compliance maintained
5. [ ] All tests pass (unit, integration, performance)

## 📊 Success Metrics
<!-- How will success be measured -->
- **KPIs:** <!-- Key performance indicators -->
- **Testing Strategy:** <!-- How to validate the feature works -->
- **Rollback Plan:** <!-- If something goes wrong -->
